name: ConnectionStatusEnum
summary: The status type defines what the status of a connection or a detail is. In the model the color of the symbol (green, yellow, red) indicates the status.

enum_values.name: STATUS_OK
enum_values.summary: The status is ok and the symbol color is green.

enum_values.name: STATUS_WARNING
enum_values.summary: The status indicates a warning and the symbol color is yellow.

enum_values.name: STATUS_ERROR
enum_values.summary: The status indicates an error and the symbol color is red.
